ModMetaData.name: FIP - RobCo
ModMetaData.author: Feil
ModMetaData.description: Rethemes RimWorld's mechanoid roster as RobCo Industries robots — Assaultrons, Mr. Handy, Eyebots, Protectrons, Liberators, Liberty Prime, and more — complete with custom textures, voice lines, factions, research trees, implants, and Fallout-flavored starting scenarios.
